content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms (like ICM and RND from Topic A) can be repurposed to prioritize which new unlabeled data gets encoded into long-term memory for state-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agents, rather than only using curiosity to drive exploration. This creates a self-reinforcing cycle where agents autonomously expand their memory with high-value, surprising data that improves future active learning performance without human labeling guidance.
